author: mehdi.aouadi
content:
I just published a Teku docker image under `ethpandaops/teku:focil` with a working impl of Teku on top of Heze. I managed to run an interop with Lodestar and the chain was finalising (both using Besu as EL). Here's the kurtosis config I used:
```yaml
participants:
  - el_type: besu
    el_image: ethpandaops/besu:focil
    cl_type: lodestar
    cl_image: ethpandaops/lodestar:focil
    count: 2
  - el_type: besu
    el_image: ethpandaops/besu:focil
    cl_type: teku
    cl_image: ethpandaops/teku:focil
    count: 2

network_params:
  preset: minimal
  gloas_fork_epoch: 1
  heze_fork_epoch: 2

spamoor_params:
  image: ethpandaops/spamoor:master
  spammers: []

additional_services:
  - dora
  - spamoor

dora_params:
  image: bbusa/dora:focil

port_publisher:
  additional_services:
    enabled: true
    public_port_start: 30000
```
